faqs.question: What types of spiders are most common in Hackensack, NJ?
faqs.answer: Hackensack residents typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows or brown recluses. Our technicians are trained to identify all species and apply the most effective treatment methods for each type found in your property.

faqs.question: Are your spider control treatments safe for children and pets?
